message:
Add Series str expandtabs/index_of/rindex_of conformance coverage

Add conformance fixtures and harness support for:
- series_str_expandtabs: Replace tabs with spaces
- series_str_index_of: Find first occurrence of substring
- series_str_rindex_of: Find last occurrence of substring

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
